title: clinopodium alpinum subsp. meridionale
intro: Clinopodium alpinum subsp. meridionale, also known as mountain savory, is a plant species within the mint family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium alpinum subsp. meridionale include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
